title: VDM Attorneys and Lew Geffen Sotheby’s lead business league bowling
description: GEORGE NEWS - Round 4 of the Lew Geffen...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Round 4 of the Lew Geffen Sotheby’s Spring Business League was held at George Bowling Club last night, Thursday 7 November.


> VDM Attorneys were the session winners for round 4 and are currently in first position in the plate section.


With only two rounds to go, sponsors Lew Geffen Sotheby’s International Realty are leading the field in the Cup section with 48 points, with the Old Mutual Green Machine team in second position with 44 points.

In the plate section, VDM Attorneys are currently in first place with 35 points, with the George High Rollerzz close on their heels in second place with 34 points.

Round 5 will take place next week on Thursday 14 November with the final round the following week on Thursday 21 November.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
